Euclid Surface Photometry Pipeline
  • Pipeline Overview
  • View page source

Pipeline Overview

The pipeline consists of five sequential modules (M1–M5), illustrated in the figure below for the galaxy EUCL J040743.76−465230.1.

Module summary

Module

Function name

Purpose

M1

euclid_module1()

Multi-band cutout creation, background addition, centre refinement, and multi-tool contamination masking.

M2

euclid_module2()

Isophote-fitting of the VIS image to derive radial PA and ellipticity profiles used as the master geometry for all bands.

M3

euclid_module3()

Adaptive sky background estimation per band, profile extent determination, and multi-band SB profile extraction.

M4

euclid_module4()

Asymptotic magnitudes, half-light radii, isophotal radii, concentration indices, axis ratios — one set per photometric band.

M5

euclid_module5()

Change-point detection, piecewise Sérsic + broken-exponential fitting, BIC-based model selection, and disc break type classification.

Data flow

Master catalogue (ra, dec, kron_radius, redshift)
        │
        ▼
┌────────────────────────────────┐
│  M1 – Cutouts & Masks          │  → cutout_VIS.fits, mask.fits
└────────────┬───────────────────┘
             │
             ▼
┌────────────────────────────────┐
│  M2 – PA / ellipticity profile │  → master-profile.csv  (PA, ε vs r)
└────────────┬───────────────────┘
             │
             ▼
┌────────────────────────────────┐
│  M3 – Sky bkg + SB profiles    │  → profiles.csv  (μ per band vs r)
└────────────┬───────────────────┘
             │
             ▼
┌────────────────────────────────┐
│  M4 – Photometry               │  → photometry.csv  (mag, r_eff, …)
└────────────┬───────────────────┘
             │
             ▼
┌────────────────────────────────┐
│  M5 – Disc break classification│  → breaks.csv  (type, h_in, h_out, r_b)
└────────────────────────────────┘

    • Scientific description
  • Module 5 – Disc Break Classification
    • euclid_module5()
